text: Molecules featuring such bonds have been investigated along with discussions of the nature of the bonding as derived from modern quantum chemical methodology. Molecules which possess chemical bonds where a bare group-14 atom C–Pb is bonded to σ-donor ligands L or to a transition metal fragment [TM] through donor–acceptor interactions are discussed together with an analysis of the bonding situation with modern quantum chemical methods.
